subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath sent down for whomsoever desireth to quaff the choice sealed Wine through My Name, the Self-Subsisting, and turneth unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن اراد ان یشرب الرحیق المختوم باسمی القیوم و یتوجه الی
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
